name: Class: CanDisturbanceExternalTrigger
title: Class: CanDisturbanceExternalTrigger
description: This trigger can be used, if a sequence or a frame based sequence should be sent based on a digital input value.
You can access control information of a CanDisturbanceExternalTrigger object with the following attributes:
tables: Number of the DIO channel. Possible values: 0: DIN0 1: DIN1
The trigger type used for the external trigger. Possible values: 0: Active Low 1: Active High 2: Rising Edge 3: Falling Edge
